product_updates.title: Do you want to build a robot snowman?
product_updates.content: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.

product_updates.title: Cursor admits its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI’s Kimi
product_updates.content: Building on top of a Chinese model feels particularly fraught right now.

product_updates.title: Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla
product_updates.content: Elon Musk recently outlined ambitious plans for a chip-building collaboration Tesla and SpaceX — but he has a history of overpromising.

product_updates.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
product_updates.content: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

product_updates.title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
product_updates.content: Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.

product_updates.title: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business?
product_updates.content: Maybe tokens really will become the fourth pillar of engineering compensation. But engineers might want to hold the line before embracing this as a straightforward win.
